title: No need to attack power of judicial review so much; we know our limitations: Supreme Court in Sabarimala reference
description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday said it was aware of the limits of judicial review in religious matters and that there was no need for extensive arguments against it.A Constitution Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant along with Justice BV Nagarathna, Justice MM Sundresh, Justice Ahsanuddin Amanullah, Justice Aravind Kumar, Justice Augustine George Masih, Justice Prasanna B Varale, Justice R Mahadevan and Justice Joymalya Bagchi made the observation during the hearing of a reference cas
